Meta.title: Chateame — Auto-reply to your DMs
Meta.description: Connect Instagram and Facebook in 3 taps. Your AI assistant automatically replies to repetitive messages.

Connect.title: Auto-reply to your DMs
Connect.subtitle: Connect your social accounts and start replying effortlessly. No signup, no forms.

Connect.noSignupRequired: No signup required. Login IS the connection. Your data stays protected.

Onboarding.greeting: Hello! Let's set up automatic replies for your business. Based on your profile, I've prepared some frequently asked questions for you to review and adjust.
